Header.Name: triPeople - Synchronous - Refresh Group and Licenses

Task.TaskLabel: Delete Reference to Group Details from My Profile
Task.Description: Since this is an embedded section the old references need to be deleted before they are copied again from triPeople.

Task.TaskLabel: Delete Reference to License Details from My Profile
Task.Description: Since this is an embedded section the old references need to be deleted before they are copied again from triPeople.

Task.TaskLabel: Update triPeople Password from My Profile
Get My Profile associated to triPeople
